INGREDIENTS
Servings: 4-6

1 tablespoon oil

1 tablespoon ginger, minced
6 cloves garlic, minced
1 onion, diced
6 cups vegetable stock
1 cup water
1 cup shiitake mushrooms, stems removed and sliced
1 tablespoon soy sauce
1 teaspoon miso paste
Ramen noodles

Parsley

Radishes, sliced
Onions, sliced and sautéed
Spinach
Bean sprouts, sautéed
Corn
Jalapeños, sliced and sautéed
Green onions, sliced

Vegan Jjajangmyeon
Serves 4 to 6

Ingredients

For the Shiitake Mushroom Broth
1 cup hot water
5 dried shiitake mushrooms

For the Veggies
1 1/2 Tbsp chopped garlic (approximately 4 to 5 cloves)
1 Tbsp hopped fresh ginger
1/4 cup chopped green onions (approximately 2 to 4 green onions)
1 large onion, cut into large chunks (approximately 10 oz)
1/4 of green cabbage, cut into large chunks (approximately 8 oz)
1 large zucchini, cut into cubes (approximately 12 oz)
4 to 5 baby portobello mushrooms (approximately 4 oz)

For Stir Fry
2 Tbsp cooking oil
1/3 cup black bean paste, Chunjang (you can substitute to white or red miso if you prefer.)
1 Tbsp unrefined raw sugar
2 Tbsp vegetarian oyster sauce
1 Tbsp cornstarch
Black or white pepper to taste

To Serve
Dried udon noodles (3 oz per serving)
Julienned cucumbers

title: Yogur con Chía y Fruta - Recetas Express
description:
Yogur con Chía y Fruta - Recetas Express | https://recetas.lidl.es/Receta/Yogur-con-chia

Raciones: 4 | Dificultad: fácil | Tiempo preparación: 45 minutos
 
Ingredientes:

- 60 g de semillas de chía ecológica Bio Organic
- 200 ml de bebida de avena
- 3 yogures naturales 
- ½ mango
- 1 kiwi
- Avena
- Arándanos 
 
Elaboración:

1. Mezclamos las semillas de chía con la bebida de avena, añadimos los yogures y refrigeramos media hora para conseguir una textura glutinosa. 
 
2. Pelamos el medio mango y el kiwi. Los cortamos en dados y en ruedas respectivamente y reservamos. 
 
3. Disponemos la avena en la base de un recipiente transparente, incorporamos la mezcla de chía con leche y yogur.
 
4. Decoramos con los dados de mango, el kiwi, arándanos al gusto y… ¡a disfrutar!

Descarga el paso a paso de la receta en PDF: https://www.lidl.es/statics/lidl-offering-es/ds_doc/Receta-express-yogur-chia.pdf

description:
I'm showing you all the awesome vegan food I found on my trip to Italy. John and I visited the Amalfi Coast, Sicily, and Rome. This is only part 1 because there was just so much food!

Airbnb in Palermo!
https://www.airbnb.ca/rooms/7092241

FEATURED IN THIS EPISODE:
Chef Express Gas Station (somewhere just outside of Rome!) - paprika Pringles & americano
Divina Vietri - Amalfi Coast beer, fried pizza, margherita style pizza without cheese, arugula salad. There were no vegan restaurants in Amalfi or Vietri that we could find so you'll be making up meals like this at whatever restaurant you go to!
cuorebio (grocery store in Pompeii) - lots of vegan stuff! Be sure to buy your own almond or soy milk for coffee!
Restaurant in Pompeii - vegan croissants
in Amalfi - vegan chocolate gelato (the exact restaurant name is unknown!)

title: How to Make Mexican Vegan Pozole Rojo (Pozole Vegano) #veganpozole
description:
👉🏽 FREE PRINTABLE RECIPE: https://mexicanmademeatless.com/how-to-make-vegan-pozole-rojo/

Learn how to make authentic Mexican Vegan Pozole Rojo (Pozole Vegano). This delicious, traditional meatless recipe uses mushrooms for the perfect texture! 

Pozole has always been a special occasion meal in Mexico. People will serve it for birthdays, all sorts of parties, and it’s very popular during the holiday season and quite common to see pozole on offer at the Christmas dinner table. 

In the 10 years that I’ve been making it this way, I’m fully satisfied every time the pozole craving strikes. 

Try my vegan pozole verde: https://youtu.be/AI6gMU2j6HU

31 oz or 900gm hominy drained and rinsed
3 whole dried guajillos chiles
2 whole dried ancho chiles
2 whole dried pasilla chiles optional
3 whole dried chiles de arbol optional
8.5 cups 2 lt. of vegetable broth
16 oz container of crimini mushrooms sliced
½ medium white onion
2 whole large garlic cloves
1 teaspoon coarse sea salt adju

title: vegan Italian anginette cookies | hot for food
description:
we're making a classic Italian cookie called an anginette (or maybe anginetti? The internet says both!). These cookies are cakey, lemoney, and slightly sweet. Plus they have funfetti sprinkles which are always the best in my books! I'm making these cookies as part of a series called  Dinner Exchange on Kin Community's channel and an awesome hot for foodie named Joe Rap gave me his grandma's recipe from his family so we could share a vegan version with the world!

WATCH DINNER EXCHANGE http://bit.ly/DinnerExchangeEp2

GET THIS RECIPE http://bit.ly/2jWrpBx

Big thanks to Joe Rap for participating in this episode of Dinner Exchange. Check out his Twitter here: https://twitter.com/thatjoerapkid

title: Homemade Energy Bars | SO VEGAN
description:
Find the full recipe at http://bit.ly/2u9y5nF

So what does it take to make the ultimate homemade energy bar?

They need to be packed with protein and contain tons of nutrition, but most of all…they should be delicious, right?

Well…we think we might have mastered just that! These bars are a real winner. The apricots and maple syrup help glue all the ingredients together, while bringing a lovely sweetness to the bars. And the combination of raisins, seeds, berries and nuts packs tons of interesting flavours into each bite.

Also, thank you to our friends over at Teami Blends for supporting this recipe! You can learn more about their products at https://www.teamiblends.co.uk/.

title: Super Simple Dhal | SO VEGAN
description:
Find the full recipe at http://bit.ly/2tPmVoE

Dhal, or is it daal, dal or dahl? Who really knows? However it’s spelt, this famous Indian dish is a real favourite in our household, and it’s about time we tried mastering it for ourselves.

Packed with protein and nutrients, this dhal recipe is simple, warming and a go-to for anyone who loves Indian cuisine as much as we do.

We serve our dhal with chutney and poppadoms, and sometimes rice if we’re feeling a bit peckish!

Enjoy.

Roxy & Ben

title: Pancake ai FIOCCHI D’AVENA senza lievito | La Cucina di Lena
description:
Salve a tutti. Nuova ricetta del martedì. 
Oggi vi presento una ricettina furbissima per i giorni no latticini no lievito in cui i Pancake classici sono banditi, non solo per la presenza di lievito, ma anche semplicemente per la farina che viene considerata un lievito per via della fermentazione che avviene in cottura. Si potrebbero usare i semplicissimi Banana Pancake ma questi ultimi sono privi di carboidrati e non aiuterebbero a comporre quindi quella parte del pasto. 
Invece questo piccolo trucchetto con i fiocchi d’avena li rende perfetti per integrare la parte di carboidrati :D

Ingredienti per 9 mini pancake (dose per una persona)
6 cucchiai di fiocchi d'avena
1 uovo
latte d'avena q.b.
e opzionale 1 cucchiaino di marmellata di fichi

La marmellata aiuta anch’essa la parte di carboidrato ma potete benissimo evitarla nell’impasto e usarla come aggiunta esterna. Oppure evitarla del tutto ;)

SE QUESTO CONTENUTO TI E’ PIACIUTO  OFFRIMI UN CAFFE’ https://ko-fi.com/lacucinadilena

title: Fastensuppe für die Fastenzeit [Rezept] - Vegan
description:
Eine Fastensuppe ist für viele Fastende das Highlight im Fastenalltag. Diese Fastensuppe aus Gemüse, Knoblauch, frischen Kräutern und Gewürzen ist sehr aromatisch und schmeckt ausgezeichnet.

Rezept für 9 Portionen
150 g Kartoffeln
150 g Karotten
100 g Knollensellerie
100 g Zwiebeln
100 g Pastinaken
100 g Fenchel
2 - 3 Knoblauchzehen
3 Ltr. Wasser
2 Thymianzweige
2 Rosmarinzweige
1 Liebstöckelzweig
3 Salbeiblätter
2 Lorbeerblätter
½ Bund Koriander
½ TL Kümmelsamen
½ TL ganze Nelken
½ TL Wacholderbeeren

Zubereitung
Die Kartoffeln, die Karotten, den Sellerie, die Zwiebeln sowie die Pastinaken schälen und würfeln; vom Fenchel den Strunk entfernen, dann ebenfalls würfeln. Die Knoblauchzehen fein hacken.

Einen grossen Topf mit 3 Ltr. Wasser füllen und alle vorbereiteten Zutaten hineingeben. Dann die 2 Thymianzweige, 2 Rosmarinzweige, 1 Liebstöckelzweig, 3 Salbeiblätter, 2 Lorbeerblätter, ½ Bund Koriander, ½ TL Nelken sowie ½ TL Wacholderbeeren dazugeben und langsam aufkochen lassen.
 
Die

description:
Find the full recipe at http://bit.ly/2qX2Efp

Who would have thought it would be so easy to make a sweet potato pizza crust? We rarely have time to make pizza dough from scratch, so this simple, healthy alternative is a very worthy alternative when you have a craving for pizza!

And yep, it’s gluten free. Not bad, right?

We use tomato puree for the sauce because we love the intense, tomatoy-flavour. But you can use passata sauce instead if you prefer!

title: Vegan Mushroom Stroganoff Recipe | Collab with The Whole Food Plant Based Cooking Show
description:
With the holidays right around the corner, I'm spending a lot of time in my kitchen working on vegan recipe alternatives. Yes, tofurkey will never be as flavorful as the real thing, but there are TONS of great vegan recipe options that will wow even the toughest crowd! I simply adore this dish, and I love to make it for special occasions or holidays because it’s rich and “meaty." I’ve had many a meat-lover opt for this dish over the real meat counterpart. I have adapted this recipe from a Dr. Joel Fuhrman recipe. This dish is perfect when prepared in a slow cooker, especially one that goes from stovetop to slow cooker base. I recommend the one by 360 Cookware - http://bit.ly/2UeTq8U

PS - This video was made in collaboration with The Whole Food Plant-Based Cooking Show! Check out this link to see her incredible recipe for Green Bean Casserole https://youtu.be/v8dgF1J737c 

Mushroom Stroganoff - Serves 4


 - 1 large yellow onion, chopped
 - 1 leek, finely chopped or 1 cup pearl onions

summary:
Do- ahead:

Prepare the sauce by simmering the cauliflower in the plant-based milk for about 15 minutes until the florets are tender. And pour a kettle of boiling water over the pasta, to get it warm and tender. Ladle over the mushroom stroganoff. Top with generous spoonfuls of the sauce.

title: LATTE di NOCCIOLE - Latte Vegetale Delizioso e Digeribile
description:
Arricchite la vostra colazione con sapori nuovi! Latte vegetale delizioso, digeribile, senza lattosio e colesterolo

http://www.my-personaltrainer.it/Tv/Ricette/Preparazioni_di_Base/latte-di-nocciole.html

Ingredienti Ricetta

    1 litro di acqua
    80 g di nocciole
    1 pizzico di sale
    Essenza di vaniglia
    Facoltativo: 2 cucchiai di sciroppo di agave

Preparazione Latte di Nocciole

1. Raccogliere le nocciole (con la pellicina) in una ciotola, e coprirle con acqua. Lasciarle in ammollo per una notte.

Lo sapevi che…
L’ammollo delle nocciole è importante per ammorbidire la frutta secca: in questo modo, la successiva frullatura sarà più agevole.
Vi suggeriamo l’uso di nocciole crude, non tostate: tuttavia, per accentuare il sapore, è possibile utilizzare nocciole tostate. In quest’ultimo caso, il latte di nocciole non può essere considerato crudista.

2. Scolare le nocciole dall’ammollo per eliminare i fitati, dunque raccoglierle in un frullatore a bicchiere. Aggiungere a piac

title: Botanica - l'universo vegetale tra scienza e musica
description:
Botanica è un progetto di Deproducers, Stefano Mancuso e Aboca. Uno spettacolo originale e coinvolgente che unisce alle emozioni del suono e delle immagini i contenuti e la voce di un grande protagonista della scienza.

Una maniera innovativa con cui Aboca, in veste di co-produttore e co-ideatore, ha scelto di portare al grande pubblico gli orizzonti scientifici più avanzati del mondo vegetale.

Lo spettacolo si inserisce nel progetto "A Seminar la Buona Pianta" eventi e approfondimenti voluti da Aboca per contribuire ad uno sviluppo sostenibile, attraverso percorsi artistici e culturali innovativi.

title: Make Your Own Plant-Based Meals | Italian, Thai & Mexican!
description:
Get my subscription box! https://goo.gl/f3mMLD

RECIPES LISTED HERE - You can tweak these to your liking!

Italian - Spicy Sausage Spaghetti
Prep time - 5 minutes
Cook time - 20 minutes 
Start by boiling a pot of water for the dry spaghetti pasta. 
While the spaghetti water preps, slice 1-2 vegan Italian sausage(s) and dice 1 habanero pepper. 
Add all ingredients to a pan with 1 tbsp olive oil.
Add half a jar of marinara, stir and simmer until all ingredients are heated through.
Drain pasta and add to sauce.
Stir and serve with garnishes of choice! 

Thai - Coconut Curry Rice
Prep time - 10 minutes
Cook time - 20 minutes
Start by boiling water for 5-7 peeled and chopped potatoes.
During this time you can also start steaming your rice so it's ready by the time everything else is done. I use water to steam my rice but you can definitely use coconut milk (or coconut water) if you like. 
Start the coconut curry sauce by adding 1 can of coconut milk to a saucepan on medium heat and 1-2 cups

title: WHAT I ATE IN ITALY PART 1 {VEGAN} | FLORENCE/ROME
description:
I went to Italy with my boyfriend Jesse and his sister Tara! We had the best time. :)

Eating vegan in Italy was SO easy. Big cities like Florence & Rome already have so many vegan and vegetarian restaurant options. Stay tuned as I'll share the rest of our trip and let you know how we ordered when the restaurants weren't vegan.

title: Our Home Garden + Compost: Plant-based For The Planet  (Plus An Italy Travel Teaser!)
description:
What can you do at your home to make your surrounding environment healthier and safer for you, for your kids, and for the earth? 

There are so many reasons to start a home garden! It doesn't take much space at all to plant and grow an abundance of fruits, veggies, and leafy greens. Even if you don't have a yard, an herb harden can easily be grown in a windowsill in a sunlit room! Upon returning home from our Italian summer vacation, our garden was ripe and ready for the picking, and we've been enjoying garden fresh salads, that will hopefully provide for us all the way through the fall! On top of that, we began composting as a way to recycle our organic food scraps, to prepare nutrient dense, mineral-rich soil for next year's garden! One other thing we did in our yard this year was to opt for an organic fertilizer company. The company even left a sign in our yard that said "Walk on me!" title: EatMoveRest In Italy, Part 5: Plant-based In Positano & The Amalfi Coast *Vegan Travel*
description:
The dense cityscape gradually turned into a jagged coastline as we made our way from Roma to the Amalfi Coast. Positano was ripe with juicy lemons the size of your head and exquisite, earth-toned linens to weather the Mediterranean sun. Fuchsia bougainvillea climbed throughout the pastel homes and the deep turquoise waves crashed up against the rocky shoreline. Positano was positively wonderful, and gave us some much-needed rest & relaxation on the beach and in the quaint village.

title: Italian Vegan Mozzarella Is Coming to You!
description:
Have you been trying to cut dairy “products” from your diet but not found the perfect product to curb your nasty cheese habit? Well, you’re in luck. Plant Based Foods, Inc., has an ingenious and delicious product made in Italy from sprouted brown rice. It’s called MozzaRisella and comes in four varieties: classic, spreadable, smoky, and blue. Cheddar slices are also available and perfect for sandwiches or burgers. We’ve compiled a list of five different dishes to showcase this tasty cheese, but don’t let us limit you—the possibilities are endless.

Learn more here: https://www.peta.org/living/food/italian-dinner-ideas-vegan-mozzarella-recipe/

title: WHAT I ATE IN ITALY PART 2 {VEGAN} | POSITANO
description:
What I ate as a vegan in Positano, Italy! (I ate a LOT of gnocchi & pizza by choice, but there are definitely more options). Make sure you ask for "senza latte e senza uova" for both the pasta and the sauce. If the pasta is "fresca", it most  likely will be made with eggs. We used the Vegan Passport app anywhere there wasn't a vegan menu -- it was SUPER helpful, and I highly recommend it if you're traveling somewhere you don't speak the language -- link to that here: https://www.vegansociety.com/shop/books/lifestyle-books/vegan-passport

Check out Part 1 in Rome here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nz_POgJQwl4

Check out all the places I ate in my Positano Travel Guide here: http://champagnelifestyleblog.com/positano-travel-guide/

Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/hannahhagler

title: How To Make a Vegan Curry
description:
Today I show you how to make a delicious Vegan curry. You won't believe it's vegan! It tastes & looks identical to meat, except there are no traces of meat in this curry whatsoever. Thinking of becoming vegan? Try this recipe out! You won't regret it. Enjoy!

Ingredients:
1 Cup - Basmati Rice
Pinch of Salt
2 Onions
2 Clove Garlic
1/2 Lime
1 tbsp Curry paste
1 Cup Chickpeas
1 Bell pepper 
2 tbsp Soy Sauce
2 Tomatoes
1 Cup Basil leaves
1 Cup Mushrooms
250g Tofu
2 Can Coconut Milk
Chilli Powder

title: AGUA DE AVENA RICA Y SALUDABLE PARA BAJAR EL COLESTEROL
description:
Hola... gracias x estar aquí....el día d hoy les quiero compartir UNRA RICA RECETA DE AGUA DE AVENA RICA Y SALUDABLE QUE AYUDA A BAJAR EL COLESTEROL..... espero les guste la receta, es muy rica y se puede tomar como agua d tiempo; 📣📣📣  ACLARACIÓN 🔊🔊🔊 NO SOY MÉDICO NI NADA X EL ESTILO, SOLO TE COMPARTO LO QUE EN ALGÚN MOMENTO LE FUNCIONÓ A MI FAMILIA.... ésta agua se debe tomar sin azúcar y como agua d tiempo, es decir en el trascurso del día...
Sí tú encuentras avena integral es mucho mejor...
Gracias x el apoyo....
Saludos y bendiciones 😘😘😘🙏

INGREDIENTES:

2 tz d avena entera
1 raja d canela 
2 lts d agua
1/2 lt d agua para remojar la avena con la canela

Es preferible q dejes remojando tu avena con la canela una noche antes dentro del refrigerador, pero si no puedes, solo déjala remojar d 3-4 hrs

title: Die Wahrheit über Veganismus - 30 Tage Vegan Selbstexperiment
description:
Veganismus ist der Ernährungstrend schlechthin: Es gibt mittlerweile 1,3 Millionen Veganer in Deutschland, und es werden immer mehr. Aber was sind eigentlich die Gründe vegan zu leben? Ist das wirklich gesünder und besser für die Umwelt, oder doch nur ein Trend, mit dem Geld gemacht wird? Und natürlich vor allem: Wie schwer ist das eigentlich, vegan zu leben? 
Das probiere ich in meinem Selbstexperiment 30 Tage lang aus, spreche mit Experten und lasse mein Blut untersuchen.

title: Cosa succede se cominci a mangiare avena tutti i giorni
description:
I medici e i nutrizionisti raccomandano vivamente di integrare della farina d'avena nella vostra dieta e di usarla la mattina come una sana colazione.
Il segreto è semplice: l'avena “ecologica” di buona qualità, ti aiuta a stare meglio dentro e fuori.
L'avena ha alcune proprietà uniche grazie all'ampia varietà di vitamine e minerali che contengono. Lo zinco aiuta a pulire la pelle e rimuovere le tossine e altri composti nocivi.
Il ferro è uno degli elementi più importanti per la nutrizione e la saturazione dell'umidità nelle cellule della pelle.
Il magnesio favorisce la circolazione sanguigna e il notevole rinnovamento delle cellule della pelle.
Mentre le proteine sono estremamente importanti, il tuo corpo richiede anche carboidrati e grassi, ed entrambi si trovano nella farina d'avena.
L'avena è anche ricca di antiossidanti che aiutano ad alleviare il prurito, infiammazioni e l'ipertensione.
I carboidrati a lento rilascio presenti nella farina d'avena aiutano a contenere l'appetito, e
tags_str: mangiare sano; dieta sana; ricette sane; ricette divertenti; ricette con farina d'avena; colazione sana; farina d'avena; buono per la salute; aumentare il metabolismo; ottenere una pelle migliore; fonte di proteine; antiossidanti; stare in salute; come perdere peso; come combinare il cibo; fatti sul corpo umano; stile di vita sano; cibo nutriente; cibo sano; pressione alta; consigli per la salute; dieta a base di farina d'avena

RIASSUNTO:
 
-La farina d'avena è ideale per il trattamento di Infiammazioni, come eczemi, dermatiti ed eruzioni cutanee. -Prova la farina d'avena con la torta di mele per aumentare il tuo metabolismo. -Gli ingredienti necessari per i biscotti all'uvetta di farina d'avena sono: farina, sale marino, bicarbonato, burro, un uovo, zucchero di canna, cannella, uvetta, purè di mele e avena e fiocchi d’avena. -Per cucinare farina d'avena con burro e banana, avrai bisogno di fiocchi d'avena, latte, burro di mandorla, miele ed una banana.

title: Selbstversuch: 2 Wochen vegan leben – wie ist das? || PULS Reportage
description:
Vegan Leben – der Selbstversuch! Sebastian hat ausgemistet und möchte die kommenden zwei Wochen vegan leben. Worauf muss er achten? Was ist besonders schwierig und wie gefällt es ihm?

Vegan leben ist mehr als nur vegan essen. Das hat Sebastian schon in der letzten PULS Reportage zum Thema „Vegan leben: Das kommt alles weg“ gelernt und ausgemistet. In dieser Reportage probiert er nun aus, wie es ist, zwei Wochen komplett vegan zu leben. Er wird also nicht nur vegan essen, sondern auch selbst vegan kochen, vegane Rezepte recherchieren und vegane Kleidung tragen. 

Um die Veganer-Challenge gut zu bestehen, bekommt er Rat von Vegan-Expertin Claudia, die schon seit über acht Jahren vegan lebt. Sie kennt die besten veganen Rezepte und weiß wie man es schafft, vegane Gerichte nicht als Ersatz zuzubereiten, sondern als eigene Mahlzeit. Leckeren veganen Kuchen backen kann sie natürlich auch! 

Außerdem probiert Sebastian verschiedene vegane Produkte im Bad aus und fragt nach, wieso Hygieneprod

Reinterpretamos uno de nuestros postres tradicionales con leche vegetal sin lactosa. 
https://recetas.lidl.es/Receta/Flan-de-bebida-de-avena

Raciones: 6 | Dificultad: fácil | Tiempo preparación: 90 minutos | Precio por ración: desde 0,55 euros*

Ingredientes

Para el caramelo: 
- 50 ml de agua
- 100 g de sirope de agave Bio Maribel 

Para el flan:
- 4 huevos 
- 24 g de azúcar avainillada Belbake 
- 500 ml de bebida de avena BIO Milbona 
- 1,5 g de canela molida Kania 

Para la decoración:
- Frambuesas 
- Copos de avena integrales Crownfield 
- Hierbabuena 

Materiales: 
- Flaneras

Elaboración:

1) Para el caramelo: disponemos en una olla el sirope de agave junto al agua, llevamos a ebullición y dejamos hervir durante 10 minutos. Cubrimos con él la base de las flaneras. 

2) Para el flan: batimos los huevos con el azúcar avainillado hasta espumar un poco. Calentamos la bebida de avena con la canela hasta hervir, retiramos del fue

title: Meat and Potato Pie | Hollands Meat Pie Review
description:
Meat and Potato Pies are quite traditional in Northern England, and especially in Lancashire. While it wouldn't pass muster with the clean/healthy eating brigade, a meat and potato pie is perfect comfort food on a cold winter evening. One legendary brand of Potato and Meat Pies is Hollands Pies. Hollands have made pies in Lancashire since 1851, and their pies are sold in chip shops and at football matches across the North of England. In this video, I do a quick taste test of a Holland's Pie, and then I make my own meat and potato pie from scratch. It's quite easy and utterly delicious.

The written recipe is here: https://keefcooks.com/meat-and-potato-pie-recipe/

title: Come fare formaggio perfetto caglio vegetale aceto
description:
Sapevate che il formaggio si può fare anche con caglio vegetale ed esattamente con aceto? Si, avete letto bene: per dare acidità al latte potete tranquillamente usare l'aceto ovvero il caglio vegetale. Il risultato sarà perfetto, sapore e profumo non intenso e quindi delicato. Ma come fare un ottimo primosale poi stagionato per una lunga conservazione? Il video mostra passo passo tutta la procedura e metodo perfetto come fare in casa il tradizionale formaggio stagionato da gratuggiare come solito in tutte le cucine domestiche.

title: HIGH PROTEIN LENTIL PIZZA - Vegan & Gluten-Free - 78g of Protein
description:
In this video, you will learn how to make a high protein vegan lentil pizza - the entire pizza has 78 g of protein (So if anyone asks you "But where do you get your protein from" - Show them this!). 

This lentil pizza is super easy, tastes amazing and is packed with protein.

All you need to do to get the perfect lentil pizza crust is to pre-soak the lentils overnight or before you go to work (for a minimum 6 hours) and then blend them with ¼ cup of water, 1 tsp baking soda, 1 tsp vinegar and 1 tsp salt. That`s it - You have the base, the dough ready. Now you can get creative with the toppings. 

You will find the full recipe and macros below.

title: Vegan Salad Dressing recipe | EASY ITALIAN SALAD DRESSING
description:
STOP buying salad dressing that is packed with preservatives.  You can make your own healthy salad dressing with just a few simple ingredients you may already have on hand.  Try this tonight, and I bet you will NEVER go back!  This particular dressing is similar to ITALIAN DRESSING.

Salad Dressing Ingredients:
- salt and pepper
- 2-3 tbsp lemon juice
- 2 tbsp dijon mustard
- 1/4 cup olive oil

Garden Salad Ingredients:
- lettuce (romaine or iceberg)
- red onion
- cucumber
- tomato
- carrot
- olives

Directions:
1. to make your salad dressing, combine all ingredients in a jar and shake to emulsify
2. to make your salad, chop and prep all ingredients and place in a bowl
3. pour over your salad dressing and serve!  EASY!


If you enjoyed this episode and would love to see more, remember to like, comment, and subscribe so that you won't miss a single episode!

title: The Vegan Roadie: Ciao Italia! (S03E01) SICILY
description:
In this first episode of The Vegan Roadie Season 3: Ciao Italia! Dustin explores all of the plant based eats that Sicily has to offer. He starts things off with a visit from his friend Miyoko Schinner as she helps him get the lay of the land in Ortigia. From there Dustin finds more eats in Catania and Modica. Pasta (all the pasta!), the best cannoli on the planet, famous chocolate, fried dough balls and more! Wrapped up with Dustin's signature 5 Ingredient Challenge - click play and get ready for a feast!

title: The Vegan Roadie: Ciao Italia! (S03E06) ROME
description:
In the final installment of The Vegan Roadie Season 3: Ciao Italia Dustin ends up in Rome. Find out where to get vegan snacks on the go while your getting in touristy sights, where to get some serious baked goods and savories, where the attitude paired with the food is just right and also where to kick it up a notch with some elevated dining. No matter what you are in the mood for, Rome has it for you, plant style.

title: Easy InstantPot Marinara Sauce (Vegan, Oil Free)
description:
We love Italian dishes in our house, and we really love the taste of a delicious marinara sauce. I just could never find a brand that I liked that was sugar free and did not contain oil. So I decided I would use my instantpot to create a completely whole food plant based marinara sauce. 


Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ThePlantBasedGabriel

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/plantbasedgabriel

Twitter: https://twitter.com/PlantBasedGabe

Here's the Ingredients! 

-3 cups of water
-12 oz of tomato paste
-1 oz or 1/4th cups sun-dried tomatoes 
-2 tbs maple syrup (https://amzn.to/2vT8TSN)
-1 tbs salt free Italian seasoning
-1 tsp garlic powder
-1 tsp onion powder
-1 tsp crushed red pepper flakes
-1 tsp ground black pepper

-Ninja Food Processor (https://amzn.to/2MNJVL8)

-InstantPot (https://amzn.to/2nF8EGs)

Head over to my website for the complete step by step written instructions!

https://www.plantbasedgabriel.com/

title: The Vegan Roadie: Ciao Italia! (S03E05) FLORENCE
description:
Dustin explores the many wonders of Florence, from raw food, clean eating, traditional Italian food and restaurants with a global influence, you can't go wrong when looking for plant based eats in Florence. With a stunning backdrop Dustin takes you on a journey through the city known as the "cradle of the Rennaisance"! 

The Vegan Roadie - S3: Ciao Italia! (S03E05) FLORENCE:
Both in the Basilica region, known for their locally sourced food options. Bread, soup, more bread and some local couples creating dishes from scratch along the stretch from Matera to Pulia, your appetite is certain to be satiated with unique ingredients that are rich in history and flavor!

title: Italian Bean Balls (Vegan, WFPB)
description:
Growing up one of my dads favorite things to do when we went out to eat was see how many meat balls he could get the waiter to load up onto his bowl of spaghetti. And if you happen to know the captain, you would be correct in guessing that he was always quite successful at this task. And following right in his footsteps I was always one to enjoy the meatball mania. So when I went plant based I thought that I would be stuck in the foreverness of plain spaghetti and sauce, unless I wanted to go for one of the oil filled and heavily processed faux meat balls that were available. But I recently decided to come up with a healthy vegan and plant based meat ball alternative. And the Italian bean ball was born. I love making this recipe for our non-veg friends who might just be expecting some pasta and sauce when we have them over for an Italian themed dinner. In this recipe I used my easy InstantPot marinara sauce, but any pasta sauce will work.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ThePlantBas

title: Tempeh Fatto in Casa (Sostituto della Carne)
description:
Il tempeh è un prodotto vegetale ad alto contenuto proteico. Il tempeh fatto in casa è un perfetto sostituto della carne, senza colesterolo, e altamente digerbile grazie alla fermentazione. Noto anche come "carne di soia", ha origini sud-asiatiche, e si adatta a tutte le preparazioni al posto di carne o pesce. Il sapore mi ricorda un misto tra la soia, funghi e noci. Una valida alternativa su come si cucina la soia, questa ricetta con soia gialla vi stupirà. Una volta preparato il tempeh, può essere cucinato in diversi modi: marinato, saltato in padella, arrosto, spezzattino, o cotto nel sugo di pomodoro per fare un ragù di tempeh. Una valida alternativa per chi vuole consumare un prodotto vegetale ad alto contenuto proteico senza rinunciare al gusto. Buona visione e w il tempeh!
Ingredienti per più di un kg di tempeh:
500 gr soia gialla pesata a secco
10 cucchiai di aceto
5 gr Tempeh starter(quantità per 500 gr di soia).

Lo starter l'ho ordinato da questo sito, costa pochi € e arriva

description:

title: Can A Vegan Chocolate Chip Cookie Satisfy A Cookie Lover? | Goodful
description:
Get the Goodful Cookbook and discover dozens of new vegan-friendly recipes like this one: https://bzfd.it/349w4Hr

Browned “Butter” Chocolate Chip Cookies Recipe — Don’t worry if you’re skipping the eggs and butter–these vegan chocolate chip cookies are out of this world! Make them for friends and family, or just for yourself. You won’t be sorry you did!

Makes 8-10 cookies  
Prep time: 10 minutes
Cook time: 25-28 minutes
Total time: 65-98 minutes

INGREDIENTS
3 ounces finely chopped pecans (about 1 cup)
¾ cup refined coconut oil, melted 
¾ cup dark brown sugar 
½ cup granulated sugar 
¼ cup unsweetened non-dairy milk of choice 
1 teaspoon vanilla extract 
1½ cups all-purpose flour 
½ teaspoon baking soda 
1½ teaspoons kosher salt 
1 3.5-ounce dark chocolate bar, chopped
½ cup semisweet chocolate chunks 

PREPARATION

title: How Oatly Built A $100 Million Oat Milk Empire
description:
Oatly sat in relative obscurity in Sweden for its first 20 years. In 2012, the oat milk company brought in a new CEO, Toni Petersson, with a radical new vision for the brand and with a new look and a tasty product, Oatly set its sights on America.

Update (January 5, 2021): Vegan milk brand Oatly is planning a 2021 initial public offering that could raise $1 billion, sources familiar said. The company, which is backed by Blackstone, Oprah Winfrey and Natalie Portman, has hired Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan Chase and Credit Suisse to manage the offering, sources said. Oatly’s valuation will depend on the status of the economy in the face of the uncertain Covid pandemic, the sources said.

title: How to make OAT MILK YOGURT// super thick and creamy
description:
In this video I show you how to make very thick and creamy oat milk yogurt. Oat milk yogurt is easy to make and is very inexpensive. 

Ingredients:
A ratio of 2 cups oats to 3 cups water.
A spoonful of cultured vegan yogurt (I used a small container of store bought yogurt)
Add-ins optional: coconut milk, vanilla extract, sugar

If you are using something else besides an Instant Pot for incubation, make sure the temperature stays around 110 deg. F (43 deg. C). Be sure to save at least a tablespoon of your finished yogurt to make your next batch. Make your next batch of yogurt within 10 days of your first batch to maintain the yogurt culture. 

Follow me on INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/plantifulpicnic/
BLOG:  https://plantifulpicnic.com/

title: How Plant-Based Milk Flooded The Market
description:
Alternative meat might be having a moment. Beyond Meat's trading debut quickly became the best-performing IPO of 2019. But alternative milk has been around for a lot longer, and it's forced the $107 billion dairy industry to evolve.

consumers have their choice between almond milk, rice milk, oat milk, hemp milk, coconut milk and soy milk—you get the idea. Americans are drinking less and less milk now that store shelves are flooded with more and more options.

 Paul Ziemnisky, EVP of global innovation at Dairy Management Inc., which represents dairy farmers, told CNBC in a phone interview that fluid milk, however, remains in 94 percent of households. He added that the dairy industry is finding ways to innovate through new flavors and products like Fairlife, a high-protein milk brand distributed by Coca-Cola.

"The plant-based guys like to poke and grab at just one number of a category, but we have strong pockets of growth," he said, adding that Fairlife has seen strong revenue numbers.

title: STROGONOFF DE SOJA SEM FRESCURA | CLUBE VEGANO
description:
O prato russo mais abrasileirado do mundo também pode ser veganizado. Por que não? Com essa receita prática e fácil, ninguém mais vai precisar contribuir com a crueldade de frangos para saborear esta delícia tão adorada em nossa cultura.

Inscreva-se no canal: https://bit.ly/2Dr1Nss

----------------------------------------­­­­­­­­---------------------------------­-­-­-­-­-

RECEITA COMPLETA

// Ingredientes

2 xícaras de pts média
340g de molho de tomate
100g de champignon fatiado
200ml de leite de coco
2 colheres (sopa) de ketchup
2 colheres (sopa) de mostarda
cebola a gosto
sal a gosto

// Preparo

1. Hidrate a proteína de soja em água fervente por 15 minutos. Você pode adicionar shoyu para dar mais sabor.

2. Corte a soja ao meio com uma faca. *Opcional

3. Refogue a cebola e em seguida a soja com o molho de tomate por uns 2 minutos.

4. Acrescente os demais ingredientes, sempre misturando para que tudo incorpore bem. 

Está pronto!

title: Easy Vegan Pasta Recipe + what i ate in italy
description:
Here’s my new favorite vegan pasta recipe + what I ate on my trip to Italy. Pizza, pasta and all the vegan ice cream I could find - a quick vegan northern Italy food guide some might say!

hope you enjoy x

My Recipe eBook: https://payhip.com/b/9MsP
My website: https://www.mina-rome.com/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mina_rome/
Email: minarome.yt@gmail.com

Thank you so much for watching!

------------------------------------------------------------

INGREDIENTS

#1 Best Vegan Tomato Sauce

~ 250 g cherry tomatoes (~8.8oz)
~ 900g big tomatoes (6-8 big toms) (~32 oz)
2 cloves garlic
1 small carrot
1 big onion or 2-3 small ones
1 tbsp tomato purée
1 tbsp olive oil
1 bay leaf
a handful of fresh thyme and or oregano
1 cup vegetable broth (250ml)
cornstarch slurry (1 tbsp cornstarch + 2 tbsp water)
salt, pepper to taste
sweetener to taste, if tomatoes aren’t sweet enough add about 1-2 tsp of sugar/agave ...

200 - 350g pasta of choice (7-10.6oz)

→ serves 2-3


#2 Lazy Leftover Pesto

title: Pane all'Avena Low Fat & Crackers Croccanti
description:
Questo pane all'avena è fatto con pochi semplici ingredienti, nessuna farina raffinata, solo farina d'avena e farina integrale.

Nel video ti mostrerò come preparare sia il pane sia dei crackers croccanti davvero eccezionali, è un metodo collaudato e di successo assicurato!

Questo pane veloce all'avena è veramente facilissimo da fare, prima di tutto, non c'è bisogno di impastare, l'impasto va lavorato pochissimo e va subito messo a lievitare.

 Il modo migliore di gustarlo è da solo, è pieno di semi, ricco di gusto e non ha bisogno di nessun ingrediente aggiuntivo per essere delizioso, ogni fetta questo pane lo è!

A parte questo, questo pane all'avena funziona bene per colazione, pranzo o cena, puoi godertelo in qualsiasi momento della giornata.

Assicurati di salvare questa ricetta perché non troverai un pane all'avena così buono proprio da nessuna parte!

E quando preparerai il tuo pane all'avena, ricordati di scattare una foto e condividerla su Instagram usando #fixfit così vedrò

Assicurati di salvare questa ricetta perché non troverai un pane all'avena così buono proprio da nessuna parte! spennella con del latte, cospargi con semi di zucca semi di lino e fiocchi d'avena e lascia lievitare nel forno spento per 30 minuti.

title: 5 Vegan Recipes for Italian Classics
description:
If you love Italian food but are following a plant-based diet, you don't have to miss out on classic dishes like spaghetti bolognese, fettuccine alfredo or biscotti. We've made over five Italian favorites so they're accessible to vegans and non-vegans alike. Mushrooms stand in for ground beef in our bolognese- topped with a cashew-based "parmesan"- and cashews also replace cream in recipes like penne vodka and our alfredo sauce. Pesto- often made with parmesan cheese- instead gets a boost from avocado. And our chocolate-dipped biscotti contain no eggs or dairy. title: Porridge Proteico Avena e Yogurt
description:
La semplice aggiunta di  yogurt greco, semi di chia e bevanda vegetale trasformano l'avena secca in una soffice ciotola di porridge caldo e appagante.

Vedremo due varianti dello stesso porridge, il porridge bianco con mela caramellata e cannella e quello al cacao con fettine di pera, granola e cannella.

Ma ci sono così tante diversi condimenti e ingredienti aggiuntivi che puoi sperimentare per preparare ogni mattina un porridge differente.

Naturalmente, puoi iniziare come me dai frutti che ti piacciono di più, io ho scelto mela e pera che insieme alla banana sono quelli che preferisco, inoltre, sentiti libero di utilizzare il miele al posto dello sciroppo d'acero, un pizzico di noce moscata o un po' di estratto di vaniglia,  l'elenco potrebbe continuare all'infinito!

Alcune altre idee topping sono cocco grattugiato, noci tritate, burro di noci, frutta secca, gocce di cioccolato.  Oppure potresti aggiungere un po' di marmellata, semi misti, cereali sbriciolati o qualsiasi altra cosa

summary:
Vedremo due varianti dello stesso porridge, il porridge bianco con mela caramellata e cannella e quello al cacao con fettine di pera, granola e cannella. Condimento/guarnizione per 1 Porridge al Cacao:
1 cucchiaino di cacao amaro in polvere
15g di granola
Cannella q.b. Versa mezza dose di porridge in una ciotolina e guarnisci con mela caramellata e cannella. Per il porridge al cacao aggiungi 1 cucchiaino di cacao amaro in polvere nel pentolino insieme all'avena rimanente e mescola
Componi il porridge al cacao con la mezza pera tagliata a fettine, 15g di granola, un cucchiaino di sciroppo d’acero e una spolverata di cannella.

title: Gefüllte Zucchini vegan mit Quinoa | Vegane Wunder
description:
► Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/veganewunder/
► Webseite: https://www.veganewunder.de

🔥 Schwierigkeitsgrad: mittel

REZEPT
 2 Zucchini (groß)
150 Gramm Quinoa 
150 Gramm Champions
1 Tomate (groß)
2 Frühlingszwiebeln
100 ML Suppenbrühe
4 EL Ahornsirup
1 Bund Thymian
Pfeffer (prise)

VORBEREITUNG
1. Zucchinis halbieren, mit einem Löffel aushüllen und das Zucchinifleisch in eine Schale geben. 

ZUBEREITUNG
1. Das Öl in einer Pfanne erhitzen.
2. Frühlingszwiebeln, Champions und Zucchinifleisch für 5 Minuten scharf anbraten.
3. Gekochten Quinoa dazu geben und weitere 2 Minuten braten.
4. Suppenbrühe, Tomate, Pfeffer und Thymian dazu geben und 20 Minuten einkochen lassen.
5. Den Thymian entfernen.
6. Ausgehüllte Zucchinis auf ein Blech legen und mit dem Quinoa-Gemüse füllen und mit veganem Käse bestreuen.
7. Gefüllten Zucchinis mit Quinoa bei 180-220 Grad für 20 Minuten im Ofen backen lassen.
8. Genießen!

#GefüllteZucchiniVegan #Quinoa #VeganeWunder

title: MOMMY MORNING ROUTINE | Easy Matcha Latte Recipe #momlife
description:
[recipes below]
Thanks to Califia Farms for sponsoring this video!

Iced Oatmilk Matcha Latte Recipe
(you’ll want a small bowl and a matcha whisk for this. A milk frother would also work to blend the matcha...links below recipe)

1 tsp ceremonial grade matcha powder
⅓ cup hot water (not quite boiling)
1-2 tsp agave (optional)
1 cup Califia Farms Oatmilk 
Ice

Place the matcha powder into a small bowl.
Dry whisk to break up any clumps, then add hot water. 
Use the whisk to dissolve the powder into the water. The whisk should stay touching the bottom of the bowl as you go. 
Add your choice of sweetener, and stir to dissolve.
Fill a glass with ice, then pour over 1 cup of Califia Farms Oatmilk.
Pour the matcha over the milk and ice.
Enjoy!

►1/3 cup basil leaves

title: HOW TO MAKE OAT MILK | not slimy + secret trick
description:
Learn how to make oat milk that's not slimy! I'll share 3 tips plus a secret trick. Oat milk is a creamy, vegan, plant-based, dairy-free milk. All you need are oats, water, and a blender - it's easy!

One thing to keep in mind when making oat milk is that store-bought options are heavily processed with additives. That's how brands like Oatly can achieve a certain consistency and even become frothy. And while homemade options don't froth up the same way, you'll know exactly what's going into it and you can make it fresh on demand. Enjoy!

title: Palestinian Ful Mudammas (plant based!) | Sahtein!
description:
IT IS TIME!
(Read the Q&A article with me here: https://www.amexessentials.com/tastemakers-nadia-gilbert-ful-mudammas-recipe-video/ )
Folks, this recipe has been a long time coming. Ful Mudammas (sometimes spelled “fool”) is a savory dip made from fava beans, with garlic, seven spice and tomatoes. Ful has a long history - it has been a staple since Biblical times in Egypt and the entire MENA region as a source of protein, and is packed with fiber, iron, magnesium and many other vitamins and minerals. Here is a Palestinian version based on my family's recipe!
Fava beans have a distinctive taste that is nutty and savory, with that addictive umami quality that keeps you coming back for more. I have made this for so many parties and brunches. It is one of the most special things to wake up to and share with others. Super economical, super easy and quick, and will make your body feel so good.
I hope you make this, and let me know how it goes if you do- Sahtein!

title: Receta vegana fácil - Corn Dogs Vegusta *MÍRALO*
description:
Hoy les traemos una sencilla y deliciosa receta, muy conocida en EEUU. Esta es la versión vegana de los Corn Dogs!!!

Estos son los ingredientes:
- 150 grs de harina blanca
- 150 grs de harina de maíz (la harina que se usa para hacer arepas)
- 2 cdas de polvos de hornear
- 2 cdas de azúcar rubia
- 1 cda de sal de mar
- 375 ml de leche de soya
- 125 ml de aquafaba (es el líquido de la cocción de los garbanzos)

Paso a paso:
- Debes mezclar todos los ingredientes en un bowl , primero los secos y luego incorporar los líquidos. Revolver hasta tener una masa homogénea y sin grumos. Trata de poner la masa en un recipiente largo para poder untar las vienesas con facilidad.
- Secar las vienesas y empolvar con harina blanca, es importante que estén bien secas.
- Atravesar las vienesas con palitos de brochetas (quizás debas cortar los palitos para que entren en tu sartén). También puedes partir las vienesas a la mitad para hacer mini corn dogs.
- Untar las vienesas en la masa que preparaste en e

title: PANCAKE: ricetta facile e veloce, per una colazione perfetta
description:
I pancake sono uno dei piatti più conosciuti in tutto il mondo: soffici e gustosi, possono essere mangiati a colazione o a merenda, sia dolci che salati - ma la loro versione più classica è insieme allo sciroppo d'acero, tipico dolcificante canadese molto amato da tutti. 
In questa occasione prepareremo dei pancake dolci, senza l'utilizzo di latte o di uova: infatti, si tratta di pancake vegani, che sono veramente facili da preparare. Questa ricetta è una garanzia di successo, potete stare tranquilli.
Ovviamente possiamo servirli in mille varianti, anche senza l'utilizzo di sciroppo d'acero: si sposano perfettamente con la marmellata o la crema di nocciole, ma sono ottimi anche abbinati a dello yogurt e della frutta fresca. 
In questa ricetta io li ho resi dolci, con due cucchiai di zucchero, ma possiamo tranquillamente preparare dei pancake salati omettendo questo ingrediente. 

Qui la ricetta dei PANCAKE VEGANI per iscritto: https://bit.ly/2Sc80Qk

title: Vegetable Pasta Bake tasty, filling comfort food
description:
My Vegetable Pasta Bake is a veggie packed dinner that even the meat-eaters will devour - this vegetable pasta bake is tasty, filling comfort food.

Full Veggie Pasta Bake recipe including hints and tips here: https://www.kitchensanctuary.com/vegetable-pasta-bake/

Ingredients:
400 g (14 oz) dried pasta shapes (I used rigatoni)
1 tbsp vegetable oil
1 large red onion peeled and chopped into wedges
1 red bell pepper de-seeded and chopped into large chunks
1 yellow bell pepper de-seeded and chopped into large chunks
1 courgette (zucchini) chopped
pinch of salt and pepper
2 cloves garlic peeled and minced
1 tbsp tomato puree
½ tsp dried oregano
½ tsp dried thyme
2x 400 g (14 oz) tinned chopped tomatoes
120 ml (1/2 cup) double (heavy) cream
100 g (3 packed cups) fresh baby spinach
100 g (1 packed cup) strong cheddar cheese grated
100 g (1 packed cup) mozzarella grated
Small bunch parsley roughly torn

title: CHIA PUDDING: 5 ricette per colazioni sane e veloci ♥️
description:
In questo video vedremo come preparare diverse varianti di budini ai semi di chia (o in inglese, "chia pudding"). Sono tutte ricette semplici, veloci e gustose, perfette per chi ha poco tempo ma non vuole rinunciare a una colazione nutriente, sana, ma anche buonissima. 
I semi di chia si trovano facilmente ormai in tutti i supermercati, specialmente in quelli biologici. Vanno bene sia bianchi che neri, la funzione e il sapore sono gli stessi (così come le proprietà nutritive). 
Il budino di semi di chia è sicuramente un'ottima idea per la colazione, che si può preparare anche la sera prima, ma anche per merende e snack semplici e sazianti. 
Tutti questi chia pudding si possono congelare (meglio senza frutta a pezzetti, in questo caso). Diventeranno come nuovi se scongelati naturalmente.

title: Vegan pizza and pasta bake, with Kroger 'Simple Truth' plant-based cheese & proteins
description:
Thanks to Simple Truth & Kroger for sponsoring this video! Order a pickup from your local Kroger Family store today. @simpletruth4u #simpletruth

***PASTA BAKE RECIPE, FEEDS 6-8***

1 lb Simple Truth™ Emerge Plant-Based Chick'n Grind
25 oz Simple Truth Organic™ Marinara Pasta Sauce
15 oz Simple Truth™ Plant Based Vegan Alfredo Pasta Sauce
8 oz Simple Truth™ Plant Based Non-Dairy Mozzarella Style Shreds
1 lb dried pasta
olive oil
breadcrumbs
fresh basil or parsley

Heat a thick coating of olive oil in a well-seasoned cast-iron skillet over medium-high. Put in the Chick'n Grind, and stir aggressively with a wooden spoon, scraping up anything that sticks to the pan. Stir and scrape until the grinds go brown, 5-7 minutes. 

Dump in the pasta and just enough water to come halfway up the dry pieces. Stir and cook for a minute, then stir in the bottle of marinara sauce, and 2/3 of the shreds. Use a spoon to drop in the entire bottle of Alfredo in 6-8 individual dollops — do not mix them in. T

title: SECONDI PIATTI VEGETARIANI: 4 RICETTE VELOCI E SEMPLICI
description:

Se dovete portare in tavola un pranzo o una cena vegetariani ma siete in difficoltà sulla seconda portata sappiate che la cucina vegetariana offre tante ricette semplici e sfiziose e soprattutto ricche di gusto! Noi di GialloZafferano ne abbiamo selezionate quattro: parmigiana di zucchine, cotolette di spinaci, polpette di ricotta al sugo e polpette di verdura, per un secondo vegetariano adatto a tutti!

title: Chai Latte CASERO, aprende a hacerlo
description:
👉Sigueme en Instagram: @gerardsiles
tazas de te similares a la mia: https://amzn.to/4hyMuOE
tetera de vidrio: La mia es de Ikea, pero en amazon tambien la podeis conseguir similar:  https://amzn.to/4je2ZkD , o esta otra que me parece preciosa: https://amzn.to/4ir2Hqp
preparar un té chai en casa es muy fácil, la base de la mezcla es simplemente té negro y especias.
Para hacer un Chai Latte, lo único que tenemos que hacer es infusionar nuestra mezcla del te con especias junto con leche o una bebida vegana (mi favorita es leche de almendras tostadas, pero puede ser qualquier bebida, de arroz, de avena, de soja...). 

Sobre fuego medio llevad el chai latte a unos 80-85 grados, y haced una infusion durante unos 4 minutos, removiendo con una espatula para que no se queme el fondo.

Ingredientes para té chai latte:
0.5L bebida de almendra tostada sin endulzar
4 bayas de cardamomo
4 clavos de olor
1/2 cucharita de semillas de cilantro
1 ramita de canela ceylan
1/1 cucharita de gengibre
1 anís

Sobre fuego medio llevad el chai latte a unos 80-85 grados, y haced una infusion durante unos 4 minutos, removiendo con una espatula para que no se queme el fondo. title: How to make Oat Milk NOT SLIMY! | The secret tricks for making oat milk!
description:
Hello love bugs!

So if you're like me, you've probably unsuccessfully attempted to make oat milk, and yielded a very slimy concoction. In this video, I've finally ironed out the best tips for making oat milk from scratch that's NOT SLIMY!

Why make oat milk from home? A few reasons. I love buying oat milk as mch as the next person, but sometimes I'm in a pinch while making a recipe or I just don't feel like going to the store. This oat milk recipe is literally ready in less than 3 minutes, there's no soaking required, and it's oil free, nut free, and no gums added. Literally, 2 main ingredients and 2 optional flavor enhancing ingredients. 

So I hope you dig this oat milk recipe, you can find the full step by step written instructions on my blog, linked down below! Enjoy, my friends!  


Lots of love,
Britt

title: The Untold Truth Of Oat Milk
description:
The non-dairy revolution is upon us, and nondairy folks who aren't fans of almond milk can get on board with coconut milk, soy milk, hemp milk, or the mild and creamy oat milk.

Oat milk has been getting a lot of buzz lately. It’s more sustainable than almond milk, doesn’t have issues with genetically modified soybeans like soy milk, and is way cheaper than hemp milk. It also has more vitamin B-2 than cow’s milk.

So, is all the hype true? If you are thinking about making the switch to oat milk, take a look at the untold truth of oat milk.
